settings.title: Handcrafted Excellence
settings.description: Each Beres 10 club is finished by hand in Honma's Sakata factory, representing generations of Japanese craftsmanship.

settings.title: Gold Shaft Technology
settings.description: Honma's signature gold-accented premium shafts deliver buttery smooth tempo and unmatched feel through the hitting zone.

settings.title: Artisan Aesthetics
settings.description: Refined lines, premium finishes, and iconic star ratings make Beres 10 as beautiful to look at as it is to play.

settings.title: Honma Beres 10
settings.hero_sub2: Available at Northcrest Golf · Atlanta, GA
settings.intro_body: For over 65 years, Honma Golf has defined the pinnacle of handcrafted golf equipment. The Beres 10 series elevates this legacy — each club a fusion of artisanal finishing, premium materials, and precision engineering. Northcrest is honored to bring this rare collection to Atlanta.
settings.excl_text: Honma Beres is available only through carefully selected premium retailers. Northcrest is one of a very few authorized dealers in the Southeast, ensuring that every customer receives the personalized experience this extraordinary equipment deserves.
settings.cta_sub: Our team is ready to guide you through a private fitting with the Honma Beres 10 collection. An experience unlike any other.
settings.collection_sub: Select a club below to learn more
